tasks.title: BLOCKING: does a backup procedure exist outside this repo?

tasks.title: Determine flint_vault DEK backup semantics
tasks.detail: The KMS-wrapped DEK is NOT in a pg_dump. Establish what an operator must separately preserve, and what a restore without it yields.

tasks.title: Author docs/operations/backup-restore.md
tasks.detail: pg_dump coverage/gaps, DEK, extension catalog state, pg_cron job state, RTO/RPO guidance.

tasks.title: EXECUTE the restore procedure against a real instance
tasks.detail: Acceptance criterion 1. Do not ship a theorized restore.

tasks.title: Author docs/operations/upgrading.md
tasks.detail: Supported paths, sqlx migrate ordering, ALTER EXTENSION for all five pgrx extensions, rollback stance, SemVer breaking-change policy.

tasks.title: Verify v0.10.0 -> v1.0.0 concretely
tasks.detail: p35-c004 landed a BREAKING PgBackend::acquire change. Determine whether manual steps are required.

tasks.title: Clean-machine end-to-end: install, backup, destroy, restore, /healthz
tasks.detail: Docs-only. If it cannot be done from the docs, the docs are wrong.
